title: Sleep Hunger
description: This mod adds a hunger cost to sleeping.
body:
Before you sleep you need a minimum of 8 hunger bars to be able to sleep.

After you sleep you will have no saturation and you will lose 5 hunger shanks.

Useful for balancing out sleep if you feel it makes the game too easy.

All values can be configured.

Configuration:

Saturation Cost

Hunger Cost

Hunger Needed to Sleep
